task_completion.description: Verify the Electrical Engineering Calculations app is launched.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main menu or interface of the Electrical Engineering Calculations app is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the LED resistor calculation tool.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen specifically titled 'LED Resistor', 'LED Series Resistor', or similar calculation interface is active.

task_completion.description: Verify the source voltage is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '24' is typed into the source/supply voltage input field.

task_completion.description: Verify the LED forward voltage is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '3.2' is typed into the LED forward voltage input field.

task_completion.description: Verify the LED forward current is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '20' is typed into the LED forward current input field (ensure the unit is set to mA).

task_completion.description: Verify the app calculated and displayed the correct resistance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The result area displays '1040' Ohms (and optionally '0.416' W for power dissipation) after the calculate button is pressed.

task_completion.description: Verify the calculation result screenshot is saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal or command prompt shows a command executing the screenshot save (e.g., 'screencap -p /sdcard/tasks/led_resistor_result.png') or a file manager confirms the file exists at this exact path.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the dedicated Electrical Engineering Calculations app rather than a web browser or generic search.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI elements match a native Android application for electrical calculations, not a Google search result or a web browser window.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the app by manually doing the math in the standard Android calculator.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screen shows specific input fields for LED parameters (Source Voltage, LED Voltage, Current) rather than a generic number pad with manual arithmetic operations.

integrity.description: Verify the result was generated by the app and not manually typed by the agent.
integrity.visual_evidence: The '1040' Ohms result appears in a read-only result card or text view generated by the app, not inside an editable text input field.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires using the Electrical Engineering Calculations app. The correct inputs are: Source Voltage = 24V, LED Forward Voltage = 3.2V, LED Forward Current = 20mA. The mathematically verified expected outputs are a series resistance of 1040 Ohms and a power dissipation of 0.416W. The final screenshot must be saved exactly to '/sdcard/tasks/led_resistor_result.png'.
